scripts.clean: rm -rf build coverage tmp src/*.js src/*.js.map vscode-extension/media/*.js vscode-extension/media/*.js.map
scripts.build:native: node-gyp rebuild || node -e "console.warn('Native SQLite bridge build failed; falling back to node:sqlite.')"
scripts.build:native:once: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='build/Release/doc_sqlite.node';if(fs.existsSync(p)){console.log('Native SQLite bridge already exists at '+p+', skipping rebuild.');process.exit(0);}process.exit(1);" || npm run -s build:native
scripts.build:ts: npx tsc --project tsconfig.json --outDir build/runtime --rootDir . --noCheck && node scripts/build-runtime-metadata.mjs && node scripts/build-extension-host.mjs && node scripts/build-webview-bundle.mjs
scripts.mcp:prepare: npm run -s build:ts && npm run -s build:native:once
scripts.mcp:dev:prepare: npm run -s build:ts && npm run -s build:native:once && node --watch build/runtime/src/mcp-server.js
scripts.test: npm run -s build:native:once && npm run -s build:ts && npm run -s build:test && node --test build/test/test/**/*.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: npm run -s build:native:once && npm run -s build:ts && npm run -s build:test && c8 --all --reporter=text --reporter=lcov --reports-dir build/coverage --temp-directory build/coverage/tmp --100 --include=build/runtime/src/database.js --include=build/runtime/src/doc-service.js --include=build/runtime/src/doc-format.js --include=build/runtime/src/doc-binary.js --include=build/runtime/src/doc-view.js --include=build/runtime/src/view-state.js --include=build/runtime/src/global-db-path.js --include=build/runtime/src/sqlite-native.js --include=build/runtime/vscode-extension/media/doc-pipeline.js node --test build/test/test/**/*.test.js
scripts.setup: npm run -s build:ts && node build/runtime/src/cli.js setup
scripts.ingest: npm run -s build:ts && node build/runtime/src/cli.js ingest
scripts.reconstruct: npm run -s build:ts && node build/runtime/src/cli.js reconstruct
